{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Truegold dead matter
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulsmiths]] pay a premium for [[Truegold dead matter]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
